auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a login link.
auth.sentDesc: We sent a login link to {email}. Check your inbox.
auth.linkExpired: This link has expired or is invalid. Please try again.
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: My profile
profile.displayNameHint: Shown on your listings (first name recommended).

hero.title: Your apartment in Paris —
hero.subtitle: Apartment listings for German-speaking expats and students in Paris. Direct, transparent, no agency fees.

values.title: Why Wohnen in Paris?
values.v1Desc: All listings and messages in German — no translating, no misunderstandings.
values.v2Desc: You write directly to the landlord or subtenant. No commission, no middlemen.
values.v3Desc: Every listing comes from a real person. Suspicious posts can be reported.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Search current offers by arrondissement, price, room count and type.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Write directly to the landlord in German — no agents, no detours.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Arrange a viewing and find your new home in Paris.

items.a: Yes — posting and searching listings is completely free.
For German speakers looking to rent or let in Paris — expats, students, au pairs and anyone else.

items.q: What types of listings are there?
items.a: Full apartments, flatshare rooms, and sublets. Furnished and unfurnished. Short and long term.

items.q: How do you protect my data?
items.a: We store only what is necessary. Your exact address is never shown publicly. All data is processed GDPR-compliantly.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Create a free account and find or list in minutes.

create.title: Post a new listing
create.listingTitleHint: e.g. "Bright flatshare room in the 11th arr."
create.descriptionHint: Describe the apartment, location, highlights, etc.
create.loginRequired: You must be logged in to post a listing.

footer.tagline: Apartment listings for German speakers in Paris.
footer.copyright: Wohnen in Paris. All rights reserved.
